description.value:
Cost: 1 Effect: Make a [[/check skill=medicine]] against a creature at 0 HP or below. Require 1+ rank in Medicine.

  • 1 success: The creature stabilizes at 0 HP and is no longer dying. They remain unconscious.
  • 2 successes: As above. The creature also regains HP equal to your Wisdom score and regains consciousness.

system.effect:
Make a Medicine check against a creature at 0 HP or below. Require 1+ rank in Medicine.
- **1 success:** The creature stabilizes at 0 HP and is no longer dying. They remain unconscious.
- **2 successes:** As above. The creature also regains HP equal to your Wisdom score and regains consciousness.
